name: Karl Rove
subject: Liberals hate this man.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT FOR SENATE
body:
Visit [here](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/9537403/224717773/2036/2/?90482085=aHR0cDovL2N0NC5hbWVyaWNhc25ld3NsZXR0ZXIuY29tL3U%2faWQ9MjI0NzE3NzczLjhkZjc4NzE1ODQwOGE3NzA4OTMwYWNmMTRjZjJjYTljJm49VCZsPWEtbWFzdGVybGlzdF9yaWdodC1wYXRoXzEwMTQ5OSZvPTk1Mzc0MDM%3d&x=4a8e9446) to unsubscribe.

Senator Tim Scott's story is the hallmark of the American Dream. Unlike many in politics, Tim's life was not handed to him on a platter. Tim has had to earn and fight for every single step of his journey to Congress.

Friend,

Senator Tim Scott is a man FOCUSED on constructive action and leadership. I've known that for years, but Wednesday night the country saw it with their own eyes. Unfortunately, the Left has already started a smear campaign against our great Senator from South Carolina. [**In a few minutes, I'm going to ask you to help Tim fight back**](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/9537403/224717773/199382/3/?ff2f3d13=cnAuMTAxNDk5&ff2f3d13=cnAuMTAxNDk5&x=594f1dfc), but I want to share some thoughts with you first.

Senator Tim Scott's story is the hallmark of the American Dream. Unlike many in politics, Tim's life was not handed to him on a platter. Tim has had to earn and fight for every single step of his journey to Congress.

[Stand with Tim Scott >](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/9537403/224717773/199382/4/?ff2f3d13=cnAuMTAxNDk5&ff2f3d13=cnAuMTAxNDk5&x=2b445f33)
---

Let's look back a generation. When Tim's grandfather was a boy in South Carolina, he had to quit school in the third grade to pick cotton. He never learned how to read or write. But, in the last years of his life, he watched his grandson become a United States Senator. Tim says of his life, ">From cotton to Congress in one generation". What a remarkable journey.

[Keep the American Dream alive >>](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/9537403/224717773/199382/5/?ff2f3d13=cnAuMTAxNDk5&ff2f3d13=cnAuMTAxNDk5&x=d1d21c49)
---

Tim's time in Congress has not been easy. His colleagues have gone on television to call him the "token" black man. The "woke", Liberal, establishment media attacks him regularly for not being the kind of black American that perpetuates their preferred narrative.

Tim has experienced the pain and humiliation of racism but refuses to meet this disrespect with anger. "It's too easy to be angry," he once said. "And also too unproductive." Instead, he hits the Senate floor with legislation that is innovative, creative, inspiring, and **_productive._**

Tim Scott stands for the American Dream and continues to fight for American families in Congress. The American people can rest easy knowing that Tim is on their side and fighting for them.

The Left has been attacking Tim nonstop since his speech Wednesday night and are already pouring money into the pockets of potential 2022 challengers. [**I'm asking 10,000 Americans to STAND with Tim today with a $10 or $18 contribution.**](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/9537403/224717773/199382/6/?ff2f3d13=cnAuMTAxNDk5&ff2f3d13=cnAuMTAxNDk5&x=60153fef)

Tim is the kind of leader that the American people can rely on in the Senate. Fearless, Loyal. Honest. Brave. Wise. [**We need to ensure that Tim has the resources he needs to run a successful campaign and WIN in 2022.**](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/9537403/224717773/199382/7/?ff2f3d13=cnAuMTAxNDk5&ff2f3d13=cnAuMTAxNDk5&x=22291f59)

**Stand with Tim today!**

[Chip in $100](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/9537403/224717773/199383/8/?ff2f3d13=cnAuMTAxNDk5&ff2f3d13=cnAuMTAxNDk5&x=0843a244)
---

[Chip in $50](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/9537403/224717773/199384/9/?ff2f3d13=cnAuMTAxNDk5&ff2f3d13=cnAuMTAxNDk5&x=2611d97b)

Karl Rove

It's no secret--Democrats can't win fairly, so they game the system to win their war on American values.

**The House of Representatives has PASSED statehood for Washington D.C.. **

[**The Senate is the only thing stopping the Democrats from permanently ADDING TWO far-left Democrat seats to the Senate. Help us stop it!**](https://secure.winred.com/nrsc/stop-chuck-and-nancy/?sc=pem51037m13m&utm_campaign=20210502_TY-2.101720_mike_t1060763-575&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=TY-2.101720&utm_content=20210502_a-permanent-democratic-senate-majority)

**
Democrats just want two permanently far-left Democratic seats to cushion their majority --they want control and they want power** because even their own Senators are against them on the filibuster, court packing and the minimum wage.

**[**STOP CHUCK AND NANCY**](https://secure.winred.com/nrsc/stop-chuck-and-nancy/?sc=pem51037m13m&utm_campaign=20210502_TY-2.101720_mike_t1060763-575&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=TY-2.101720&utm_content=20210502_a-permanent-democratic-senate-majority)**

**If we --no, YOU--don't step up to the plate and oppose Chuck and Nancy on this issue--the Senate will in fact become undemocratic, because it will answer to Democrats' every whim--not the American people.**

The only thing standing between the integrity of our democracy and that reality? You.

[**Will you pledge to stop Chuck and Nancy before it 's too late?**](https://secure.winred.com/nrsc/stop-chuck-and-nancy/?sc=pem51037m13m&utm_campaign=20210502_TY-2.101720_mike_t1060763-575&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=TY-2.101720&utm_content=20210502_a-permanent-democratic-senate-majority)
